Why am I not seeing emails from CDC?
To ensure delivery of email updates to your inbox, please add emailupdates@cdc.gov to your email address book, adjust your spam settings, or follow the instructions from your email provider on how to prevent emails from being marked as “Spam” or “Junk Mail.”
How can I unsubscribe from all subscriptions?
You can access Manage Your Subscriptions to unsubscribe to all your subscriptions.
Who can I contact for additional help?
If you need assistance with CDC’s email service, please contact subscriptions@cdc.gov or call CDC at 1-800-232-4636.
Other Questions for CDC 
Email: Email CDC-INFO 
Call: 800-CDC-INFO (800-232-4636), TTY: 888-232-6348 
Information on COVID-19
